1876870.name: Ook Boxing
1876870.description:
Ook Boxing is a first person melee crowd brawler where you harness elemental superpowers and clever environmental weapons to take on relentless hordes of anthropomorphic apes known as Ooks. Fight your chat with stream integration. 

Ook Sandbox 

Experience melee combat against dozens, hundreds, thousands of angry individuals.

Find and purchase items, combine them together to manipulate your environment: fuel, fire, water, explosions are all viable options to defend your throne.

Earn sacred powers and control elements (earth, fire, thunder) to inflict maximum damage to the impolite crowd.

Stream Integration 

Let your viewers join in through chat as ook AIs, with their name, skin, and the ability to control the horde with chat commands as an Ook Captain.

In lobby, donations will unlock the most unique ook skins.

In game, donations will roll the Curse wheel adding extra difficulty to the player.
1876870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
